caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a blue short-sleeved button-down shirt, stands behind a wooden lectern, delivering a presentation. The setting appears to be a room with vertical wooden slats and brown blinds in the background. A small group of people is seated in the foreground, facing the speaker; one person wears a red shirt, and another wears a blue and white plaid shirt. The lectern features a logo with a stylized red tree and the word "LIBRARY" beneath it. To the right of the scene, the text "ORCA" is displayed on the screen. A black speaker is visible on a stand behind the presenter. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hands and speaks, shifting his posture and facial expression while maintaining his position at the lectern.
